---
title: "ADS 503 Final Project - Team 3"
author: "Cameron Moran, Brandon Rodriguez-Andrade, Jacob Moore"
format: 
    html: 
        toc: true
        toc-depth: 4
        code-fold: true
    pdf: default
    docx: default
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(mlbench)
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
library(caret)
library(e1071)
library(scales)
library(AppliedPredictiveModeling)
library(gt)
library(RANN)
library(kernlab)
library(randomForest)
```
